connections.gloss: make a breach, break forth (into, out, in pieces, through, up), be ready to burst, cleave (asunder), cut out, divide, hatch, rend (asunder), rip up, tear, win.
break, divide, open, rend, make a rent
connections.def: apparently a primary verb; to split or sever (literally or figuratively):--break, divide, open, rend, make a
from 1223 and 4486; to tear asunder:--break, rend. see GREEK for 1223 see GREEK for
from 4977; a split or gap ("schism"), literally or figuratively:--division, rent, schism. see GREEK for
